data.body:
## Description

**What**: Rewrite architect-foundation to synthesize project understanding into concrete, context-aware enforcement recommendations with rationale, including test isolation enforcement. Also adopt the Socratic dialogue pattern for its gap-fill phase.
**Why**: Currently architect-foundation only collects answers through rigid questions and never tells the user what it thinks. A senior architect should propose specific enforcement mechanisms based on what they've learned about the project, not just ask and record.
**Scope**:
- IN: Rewrite architect-foundation SKILL.md Phase 1 (Socratic gap-fill) to use open-ended dialogue with follow-ups instead of multiple-choice menus; rewrite Phase 2 to synthesize findings into concrete recommendations where each cites specific project files or patterns that triggered it and explains why it fits this project; add test isolation enforcement to the recommendation set; user can accept, reject, or discuss each recommendation
- OUT: Onboarding skill changes (Stories 2f87-5437, b36f-cb7c); artifact review UX (Story a84a-c539 — architect-foundation's artifact writing is covered there)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, architect-foundation uses Socratic dialogue (open-ended questions with follow-ups, auto-detect and confirm) instead of rigid multiple-choice menus
  ← Satisfies: "Both skills use Socratic dialogue"
- When this story is complete, architect-foundation presents concrete enforcement recommendations where each cites specific project files or patterns that triggered it and explains why it fits this project's context
  ← Satisfies: "Architect-foundation synthesizes recommendations"
- When this story is complete, architect-foundation includes test isolation enforcement mechanisms in its recommendations
  ← Satisfies: "Architect-foundation synthesizes recommendations"
- When this story is complete, the user can accept, reject, or discuss each recommendation individually
  ← Satisfies: "Architect-foundation synthesizes recommendations"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] SKILL.md is a prompt file — test via structural assertions (grep for recommendation synthesis instructions, test isolation section, per-recommendation accept/reject flow)
- [Maintainability] Follow the same Socratic dialogue pattern documented in Story 2f87-5437
